title: otosma aethiopica
intro: Otosma aethiopica, also known as the African wormwood, is a plant species native to East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils which contain compounds with antiparasitic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Otosma aethiopica has been used to treat various health issues, including malaria, fever, and digestive problems, as well as skin conditions and wounds, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
